name: CANAVAN DISEASE
definition: SPONGIFORM LEUKODYSTROPHY rare form of leukodystrophy as an autosomal recessive disorder, most common in Ashkenazi

demographics.Histo: spongy degeneration of white matter with astrocytic swelling + mitochondrial

discriminating_features: white matter hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI

MR: white matter hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI
